caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio with dark, ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the legible text "Rode PodMic" on the side. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. Initially, he is looking slightly to the side with his mouth open. He then shifts his gaze and raises his right hand in a gesturing motion. Subsequently, he brings his hand up to touch the side of his headphones while continuing to speak. Finally, he extends his left arm and hand outward, gesturing toward something off-camera while maintaining an expressive facial expression.
